text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
This year's spring Tenno Sho is about to begin!
Who will seize glory today? Hang in there, folks,
because we're about to find out!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I wish Oguri Cap and Super Creek were running today.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
No point getting upset about that now! Those two
announced forever ago that they'd be skipping
the spring season.

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
Inari One's popularity may not hold a candle to
Oguri Cap and Super Creek...

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
But I'm sure she'll prove here at the Tenno Sho
that she's got what it takes to be Umamusume of
the Year!

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
Who will seize glory today? Hang in there, folks,
because we're about to find out!

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's almost time! The spring Tenno Sho's 'bout
to start. C'mon, Inari! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Townswoman
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, I've got butterflies! I hope Inari's takin'
good care of herself. Do ya think she's eatin'
enough?

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa! I can't believe she's really runnin' today!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
So this is the spring Tenno Sho... Gotta say, I
never felt so much pressure at a racecourse
before.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sucks that Oguri and Creek aren't here, but the
other racers are the real deal. I gotta get creative
if I wanna win.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Time to dig my heels in 'n' brace myself! If I don't
give it my all here, my goal of becomin'
Umamusume of the Year's gonna stay a pipe
dream forever!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I've gotta do this for everyone else too...
choice_data_list: You're gonna psych yourself out at this rate.
You're gonna psych yourself out at this rate.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I know... But I'm gonna win! No matter what!
